title: Crossbows Loads
description: Ever wanted certain items able to be loaded in to a crossbow?
body:
# Description:
Crossbow Loads is a lightweight (_somehow_) that makes it that players are able to load new projectiles in to a crossbow.

### Small History:
Originally this project was to recreate the infamous [ender pearl loaded crossbow feature from Cracker's wither storm mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/crackers-wither-storm-mod) but then it turned to a funny project about adding more items.

## Content:
Currently the pack only supports a few projectiles, like:
- [Ender Pearl](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Ender_Pearl)
- [Wind Charge](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Wind_Charge)
- [Breeze Wind Charge](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Breeze#Wind_charge) (_When loaded with a [Breeze Rod](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Breeze_Rod)_)
- [Fire Charge](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Fire_Charge)
- [Snowball](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Snowball)
- [Eggs](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Egg):
  - Normal Egg
  - Brown Egg
  - Blue Egg
- [Bottle o' Enchanting](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Bottle_o%27_Enchanting)
- [Wither Skull](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Wither#Wither_Skull) (_When loaded with a [Wither Skeleton Skull](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Wither_Skeleton_Skull)_)
- [Dragon Fireball](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Ender_Dragon#Dragon_Fireball) (_When loaded with a [Dragon's Breath](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Dragon%27s_Breath)_)
- [Shulker Bullet](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Shulker#Shulker_bullet) (_When loaded with a [Shulker Shell](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Shulker_Shell)_)

The way this pack works is like how you would normally load a firework rocket in to a crossbow.

Simply put the crossbow in your mainhand and the projectile in your offhand and right click to start loading the crossbow
